title: 'Asher #0836
definition:
Asher = "happy"

 1) son of Jacob and Zilpah
 2) the tribe descended from Asher
 3) a city east of Shechem in Manasseh
nasbUsage:
Definition: Asher = "happy"

 1) son of Jacob and Zilpah
 2) the tribe descended from Asher
 3) a city east of Shechem in Manasseh

    NASB:  happy one, a son of Jacob, also the tribe descended from him, also perh. a city in Pal.
